questions.question: Describe the primary function of a package manager in an automated installation process. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A package manager is responsible for organizing and installing software components.

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using automated installation tools, such as Ansible or Puppet, over manual installation methods? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Automated tools reduce the risk of human error and increase efficiency in large-scale deployments.

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'idempotent' operations in an automated installation process. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Idempotent operations ensure that multiple runs of the installation process have the same effect, preventing duplicate work or errors.
